name: Duplicated GPU layout
input: Two kernels and a verifier each define a slightly different struct layout.
expected_behavior: Finds owners, chooses one canonical layout, moves consumers, and avoids verifier re-derivation drift.

name: QEC decoder wrapper
input: A new decoder path adds an adapter beside an old one for unshipped code.
expected_behavior: Collapses to one decoder contract unless an external compatibility boundary justifies a bridge.

name: Different semantics
input: Two similar modules look related but have legitimately different contracts.
expected_behavior: Does not force reuse; documents the distinction after inspection.
